Master in Public Health
The master degree program in public health is designed for individuals seeking academic professional training in public health. The program equips students with the specific knowledge and skills of public healt...
Welcome to the Central Department of Public Health. This is the only Central Department under the Institute of Medicine that was established in Bhadra 2075. The Department, based in Maharajgunj, Kathmandu, hosts about 225 students at any point of time at bachelors, masters and doctoral level education in public health, health promotion and education, and public health nutrition. Our alumni members are more than 1,500 around the world and are engaged in various professional settings suc...

Biostatistics
Population Health, Nutrition, Demography
Health promotion and education
Public health
Here are several of our alumni.
“Four-year Undergraduate span was not only limited to theoretical knowledge, CDPH (Central Department of Public Health) had encouraged me for active participation in field practice, leadership, and various other associative activities. One-month Community Health Diagnosis in 2nd year, two-months District/Municipal health System Management in 3rd year and four months Comprehensive Public Health Practicum in final year is the learning environment that helps to translate our theoretical knowledge into practical knowledge and skills. I would like to highlight another pride thing for the students studying in this educational institution, students’ own umbrella organization NPHSS (Nepal Public Health Students’ Society), which has been raising voice and interests of every student studying under CDPH. Luckily, I had to an opportunity to lead this organization as a President for the tenure of one year which has played a huge role in my leadership skill development. I am grateful to all the respected teachers who has helped me to successfully complete my Bachelor’s Degree. If I had to share the best part of my journey in CDPH family, it is the mutual bonding between seniors and juniors. I wish for the betterment of CDPH in the future days and I am sure this institution will always prove to be the best academia to help to change the public health situation of the country.” — Janaki Pandey
Batch No. 2015
“Since its establishment, my experience as students of Master in Public Health Nutrition (MPHN) in the Central Department of Public Health (CDPH) was terrific and memorable. It did not only advance my studies and knowledge, but it gave me exposure to cosmopolitan culture, the opportunity to make friends from various corners. The Public Health Nutrition Program at CDPH is truly intellectually exciting and experiential. The outstanding curriculum and seasoned faculty members provided me a comprehensive knowledge of nutrition programs and policies. They had well-trained me to be very independent and act beyond my boundaries. I got opportunities to participate in a myriad of workshops, seminars, and fieldwork, provided hands-on experience. Additionally, it encouraged me to look at things from various perspectives, strengthening my analytical and leadership skills. It allows me to pursue a field that I am interested in, making it easier for me to unleash my potential. I would say that the student-faculties relationship makes CDPH a great place to begin your academic career. I thank CDPH fraternities for putting in all the efforts to groom us and make me professional. MPHN” — Ashish Timalsina
Batch No. 2018
“It’s my fortune to enroll in MHPE as the first batch of CDPH. Center Department of Public Health (CDPH) aims to produce quality and skill-full public health graduates. As a student of Masters of Health Promotion and Education, CDPH had provided us an immense opportunity to learn about various aspects like IEC development, curriculum development, action research, practicum, different theories and model for social behavior change, and others specific health promotion and education-related activities. CDPH provides a very personalized, friendly, supportive and vibrant environment for students that help to develop the best professional career I am happy to be a part of it. PREETI BHATTARAI MHPE” — PREETI BHATTARAI
Batch No. 2018
Overview of the Central Department
The Central Department of Public Health is a leading central department of the Tribhuvan University devoted to excellence in teaching, learning, and research, and to developing leaders in many disciplines of public health who make a difference in professional practice, health systems, and ultimately human lives both locally and globally. It contributes to community medicine, public health methods and research to other clinical, nursing and allied health science programs as well. The department largely contributes to produce competent and socially responsible public health professionals through community-based learning approaches and focus on research in the fields of public health importance.The Department, which is based in the premises of IoM, Maharajgunj, Kathmandu, has an annual enrollment of close to a hundred candidates, including bachelors, masters and doctoral students of public health, health promotion and education, and public...
